name: Calculating Mutual Information between a Reward Maximizer and its Environment
summary: arXiv:2602.12963v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: An important question in the field of AI is the extent to which successful behaviour requires an internal representation of the world. In this wo...
description: arXiv:2602.12963v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: An important question in the field of AI is the extent to which successful behaviour requires an internal representation of the world. In this work, we quantify the amount of information an optimal policy provides about the underlying environment. We consider a Controlled Markov Process (CMP) with $n$ states and $m$ actions, assuming a uniform...
author: Alfred Harwood, Jose Faustino, Alex Altair
